steps.title: Identify the given slope
steps.content: Line $p$ is written as $y=5x+\frac{1}{8}$, so its slope is $5$.

steps.title: Use the negative reciprocal
steps.content: Perpendicular lines have slopes that are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of $5$ is $$ -\frac{1}{5} $$ The answer is B.
